items.name_en: PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.

items.name_en: 【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
items.name_cn:
【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
 The Goyard Jouvence series is a classic in Goyard's art of life and travel! Handcrafted from cowhide, paired with a yellow lining, featuring an inner and outer pocket design 👛👛 Simple, lightweight, sturdy, and durable. The clean and tidy lining and elegant appearance make it an indispensable functional product for travel 💃💃
 🔆The large toiletry bag is the perfect choice for large capacity storage 🔆The small toiletry bag is for carrying essentials, accommodating quick touch-ups, and can also be used as a small wallet and clutch, representing Goyard's practicality and urban style.
Size GM size :30x23×7.5cm
🔎 020206

items.name_en: 【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Original with Full Counter Packaging】【Full Steel Hardware Deep Blue】 The top-quality Saint Louis shopping bag is made of GOYARDINE canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, and can be used on both sides. The front is GOYARDINE canvas, and the other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles go from thin to thick, supporting multiple carrying methods. It comes with a detachable inner bag that hangs on one of the handles for easy access.

items.name_en: 👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
items.name_cn:
👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
🌟Beechwood handle + unique silhouette = unforgettable
🌟Cotton-linen fabric and leather patchwork + yellow calfskin lining = exquisite from the inside out.
🌟Perfect strap length, only 250g! Light enough to make you doubt if it's a bag. This is the unique charm of MiniSaigon.
🌟Suitable for any style and occasion, no need to worry about matching. Absolutely stunning.
🌟All the beautiful colors are shared here. A safe bet, no wrong choices.
